det_check_template:
proof fn det_remove_helper6<T: Copy, const N: usize>(pre_self_: StaticLinkedList<T, N>, remove_index: SLLIndex, v: Ghost<T>, post1_self_: StaticLinkedList<T, N>, r1: T, post2_self_: StaticLinkedList<T, N>, r2: T)
    requires (pre_self_.wf()), (pre_self_@.contains(v@)), (pre_self_.get_node_ref(v@) == remove_index), (pre_self_.value_list_len != 1), (pre_self_.free_list_len != 0 && pre_self_.value_list_tail == remove_index && pre_self_.value_list_len != 1),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_self_.wf())
            &&& (post1_self_.len() == pre_self_.len() - 1)
            &&& (post1_self_.unique())
            &&& (post1_self_@ =~= pre_self_@.remove_value(r1))
            &&& (r1 == v@)
            &&& (forall|v:T|
                #![auto]
                post1_self_@.contains(v) ==> 
                    pre_self_.get_node_ref(v) == 
                        post1_self_.get_node_ref(v))
            &&& (post2_self_.wf())
            &&& (post2_self_.len() == pre_self_.len() - 1)
            &&& (post2_self_.unique())
            &&& (post2_self_@ =~= pre_self_@.remove_value(r2))
            &&& (r2 == v@)
            &&& (forall|v:T|
                #![auto]
                post2_self_@.contains(v) ==> 
                    pre_self_.get_node_ref(v) == 
                        post2_self_.get_node_ref(v))
        }) ==> det_remove_helper6_equal(r1, r2, post1_self_, post2_self_),
{
{ASSUMES}}
